data.content: 1. The implementation in commit 57ecb5e3763a removes the Type column insertion from getBeatColumns for the Queues/default view, which matches the requested UI change. 2. Sanity gates passed on an isolated snapshot of that commit: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build all succeeded. 3. The required behavior is not covered by tests: src/lib/__tests__/beat-columns-helpers.test.ts only asserts that the type column is hidden in the active view, and it does not assert that the Queues/default view omits the type column. 4. Return this beat to implementation to add or update a test that explicitly verifies the Queues/default columns do not include type.
